name: Tropical Fruit Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound store bought fruit salad from a salad bar
1 star fruit or carambola, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain off any excess liquid from the store bought fruit salad.
2. In a large bowl, toss together all of the fruit, sugar and Grand Marnier.
3. Serve mixed fruit with mint leaves as garnish.
